case_title: WALDO PEREZ VS. O'NEILL'S GHIRADELLI SQUARE, LLC A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, WALDO AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL'S GHIRADELLI SQUARE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL'S GHIRADELLI SQUARE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, WALDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'NEILL'S GHIRADELLI SQUARE, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $4,929.23 PRINCIPAL, $28.73 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,157.96, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT RICHARD B. COLE AS RECEIVER - NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF WALDO PEREZ'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER AND TO APPOINT RICHARD B. COLE AS RECEIVER IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Waldo Perez's Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
